content: We can frame Self-Refine's iterative self-feedback loop as a base framework that can be enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to produce higher-quality outputs without any additional training or external data. This turns single-stream self-refinement into a multi-perspective self-critique process that preserves Self-Refine's key advantage of no extra resource requirements while fixing the limitation of blind spots from single-perspective self-feedback.
